Skip navigation links
  • Module
  • Tree
  • Deprecated
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Action
    Represents the actions available to a player on a given offer tile: how many cards they may draw from the top list and how many from the bottom list.
    ActionAvailableChangedMessage
    Socket message that notifies the client that the available actions for the current turn have changed.
    ActionDTO
    DTO carrying the number of top-row and bottom-row draws available to the current player on their chosen offer tile.
    ActionNotAvailable
    Thrown when a player attempts an action that is not allowed in the current game phase or is not their turn to perform (e.g.
    AddedCardToTribeMessage
    Socket message that notifies the client that a tribe card was added to a player's tribe.
    AddPlayerMessage
    Socket message sent by a client to join the current Mesos lobby.
    ArtistCard
    Represents an Artist tribe member card.
    ArtistEvent
    Event effect for a paintings (artist) event: players with at least artistNeeded Artists gain PPtoMultiply * artistCount PP; players with fewer Artists lose PPLost PP.
    AskExtraDrawMessage
    Socket message that asks the client to pick an extra card from the end-of-round market snapshot, triggered by the draw-one-more building effect.
    askForRankMessage
    Socket message that requests the global leaderboard from the server for the specified player count.
    Board
    The Mesos game board, containing the offer tiles (where players place their totems during the placing phase) and the default tiles (where players return at the end of each round to collect food).
    BoardDTO
    DTO carrying the full board state (offer tiles and default tiles) for network transfer.
    BoardInitializeMessages
    Socket message that sends the initial board state (offer tiles and default tiles) to the client at game start.
    BoardMemento
    Memento snapshot of the board state at end of round.
    BoardObserver
    Observer notified of board-state changes: totem placements and player returns to default tiles.
    BoardTUI
    Handles all board display logic: offer tiles (with occupant and available actions) and default tiles.
    BoardView
    Read-only view of the Mesos board, exposing the current player positions without allowing direct state modification.
    BottomBuildRemovedMessage
    Socket message that notifies the client that a building was removed from the previous-round (bottom) market row.
    BottomCardRemovedMessage
    Socket message that notifies the client that a tribe card was removed from the previous-round (bottom) market row.
    BuilderCard
    Represents a Builder tribe member card.
    BuilderDoublePP
    Building effect that doubles the final prestige points of every Builder card in the player's tribe.
    BuildingCard
    Represents a building card in Mesos.
    BuildingDTO
    DTO for a BuildingCard, carrying the building ID, food cost, end-game prestige points, and trigger event type.
    BuildingEffect
    Abstract base class for all building effects, providing a typed entry point that all concrete effects must implement.
    BuildingEffectInterface
    Strategy interface for building effects.
    BuildingFactory
    Factory that reads building definitions from JSON and assembles the correct set of BuildingCards for the given player count, binding each card to its corresponding BuildingEffect.
    Card
    Abstract base class for all Mesos cards (tribe members, buildings, events).
    CARD_TYPE
    All card types available in Mesos: tribe member roles, buildings, and events.
    CardDTO
    DTO for a Mesos card, carrying the type, era, and any role-specific attributes (invention icon, shaman star, food discount, prestige points, hunter icon flag).
    CardImageFactory
    Factory utility that creates pre-configured ImageView instances for every visual asset used in the Mesos GUI (cards, buildings, totems, tiles, events).
    ChangedEraException
    Thrown internally by the market when the last card drawn from the deck belongs to a new era, signalling that the game should advance to the next era and refresh the building rows.
    ClientApp
    Entry point for the Mesos client.
    ClientLauncher
    Entry point for the Mesos client.
    ClientRemoteInterface
    Remote interface implemented by each Mesos client.
    ClientSocketProxy
    Proxy for ClientRemoteInterface over a Socket connection, allowing the server to treat a Socket client as an RMI stub.
    ClientToServerMessage
    Marker interface for all messages sent from a Socket client to the server.
    ClientTUI
    Main TUI orchestrator.
    ClientUtilitiesFunction
    Logging utilities for the Mesos client.
    ClientVirtualView
    Client-side implementation of ClientRemoteInterface.
    COLOR
    Totem colors available to Mesos players.
    CONNECTION_STATUS
    Tracks whether a player's network connection is currently active.
    Controller
    MVC controller for a Mesos game session.
    CreateGameMessage
    Client-to-server Socket message that requests creation of a new game lobby.
    DBManager
    Manages all interactions with the remote AWS RDS leaderboard database.
    DeckFactory
    Builds the Mesos card deck for a given player count by loading card definitions from JSON resources and merging in the era event cards.
    DeckFinishedException
    Thrown when the card deck runs out of cards during market refresh, signalling that the game should transition to the final round.
    DefaultTile
    A default (home) tile where players rest between rounds.
    DefaultTileDTO
    Data-transfer object for a default tile, carrying the food-per-slot-position value used to compute food rewards when players stand on the tile at end of round.
    DefaultTileFactory
    Builds the set of default tiles for a given player count by loading tile definitions from JSON resources.
    DisconnectPopup
    Floating overlay panel that notifies players about disconnection and reconnection events during a game.
    DiscountFoodOnSustenance
    Building effect that reduces the food cost of the sustenance event by awarding one food per tribe member of the configured card type.
    DoublePPOnShamanEvent
    Building effect that doubles any prestige points gained during a shamanic ritual event.
    DrawOneMoreCard
    Building effect that entitles the player to draw one extra card per round from the top list.
    EmptyMarketException
    Thrown when a player attempts to draw from a market row that contains no selectable cards (the row is either empty or contains only event cards).
    EndGameController
    JavaFX controller for the end-game screen.
    EndGameController.PlayerRankEntry
    Immutable row model for the end-game ranking table.
    EndGameException
    Thrown when the last round's resolve-action phase is complete, signalling that the game is over and winners should be calculated.
    EndGameTUI
    TUI component that renders the end-game screen.
    EndOfPlacingPhaseException
    Thrown when all players have placed their totems on offer tiles, signalling that the placing phase is complete and the game should transition to the resolve-action phase.
    EndOfPlayingPhaseException
    Thrown when all players have resolved their offer-tile actions, signalling that the playing phase is complete and the game should transition to the next round.
    ERA
    The three eras through which a Mesos game progresses.
    EraChangedMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies the client the game has advanced to a new era.
    ErrorMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that delivers an error description to the client (e.g.
    EVENT_TYPE
    Categories of Mesos event cards.
    EventCard
    Represents an event card in the Mesos deck.
    EventDTO
    Data-transfer object for an event card, carrying the event ID and type so the client can display a human-readable description of the event.
    EventEffect
    Abstract base class for all Mesos event effects.
    EventEffectInterface
    Strategy interface for event effects.
    EventFactory
    Builds the set of Mesos event cards by loading event definitions from JSON and binding each card to its concrete EventEffect implementation.
    EventPopup
    Floating overlay panel that displays the resolved event cards during a round.
    FoodOnNewCoupleInventors
    Building effect that awards 3 food for each new pair of Inventor cards sharing the same icon added to the tribe since the last time this effect was evaluated.
    Game
    Core game model for a Mesos session.
    GAME_PHASE
    Tracks the current phase of a Mesos game session.
    GameAlreadyLoadedException
    Thrown when attempting to load a new game while one is already active on the server.
    GameController
    Lightweight JavaFX game controller used during the main game loop.
    GameDTO
    Data-transfer object for the overall game state, carrying the current era, phase, and which players are next to place and play.
    GameFullException
    Thrown when a player tries to join a lobby that has already reached its maximum player count.
    GameMemento
    Memento of the full game state at end of round.
    GameObserver
    Observer interface for game-level state changes in Mesos.
    GamePhaseChangedMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies the client the game phase has changed.
    GameReadyToStartException
    Thrown when the last required player joins a lobby, signalling that the game is full and setupAndStartGame should be called immediately.
    GameStartedException
    Thrown when a client tries to create or join a lobby after the game has already started.
    GameView
    Read-only view of the Game model exposed to observers and the board.
    GameWinnersMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that delivers the final list of game winners.
    GathererCard
    Represents a Gatherer tribe card.
    GUIapp
    JavaFX Application entry point for the Mesos GUI client.
    GUIEffects
    Utility class providing shared visual effects for the Mesos GUI (icons, glow effects, anchor helpers, and error dialogs).
    GUIObserver
    Observer interface for GUI-level game events.
    HuntersCard
    Represents a Hunter tribe card.
    HuntEvent
    Event effect for a hunt event: every player receives food food and PPtoMultiply * hunterCount prestige points.
    InitializeGameMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that pushes the initial game state to the client at game start.
    InitializeMarketMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that pushes the initial market state (top/bottom card and building rows).
    INV_ICON
    Inventory icons that can appear on Inventor cards.
    InventorCard
    Represents an Inventor tribe card.
    JoinGameLoadedMessage
    Socket message sent by a reconnecting player to join a game being loaded.
    LoadGameMessage
    Socket message sent by the first reconnecting player to load a saved game.
    LobbyController
    JavaFX controller for the lobby screen.
    LobbyTUI
    Handles all lobby-phase interactions.
    Market
    Manages the Mesos card and building market.
    MarketController
    JavaFX controller for the market panel.
    MarketDTO
    Data-transfer object for the market state, carrying the top and bottom card rows and the top and bottom building rows.
    MarketMemento
    Memento snapshot of the market state at end of round.
    MarketObserver
    Observer interface for market-level state changes in Mesos.
    MarketTUI
    Handles all market interactions: drawing cards from the top or bottom of the market, passing the turn, picking an extra card from a special effect, and printing the current market state.
    MementoManager<T>
    Generic interface for classes that support the Memento pattern.
    MesosSplashScreen
    Splash screen for the MESOS board game — IS26-AM25.
    MesosSplashScreen.StandaloneApp
    Standalone JavaFX application used to test the splash screen animation in isolation, without launching the full Mesos client.
    NameOrColorAlreadyTakenException
    Thrown when a player tries to join with a nickname or totem color that is already in use by another player in the same lobby.
    NoGameToLoadException
    Thrown when the server attempts to resume a saved game but no save file is found.
    NoMoreActionToDo
    Thrown when a player has exhausted all their available draw actions for the current turn, signalling that the turn should automatically advance to the next player.
    NoPPLostOnShaman
    Building effect that prevents the player from losing prestige points during a shamanic ritual event.
    NotEnoughFoodException
    Thrown when a player attempts to purchase a card but does not have enough food to pay its cost.
    NotSelectableCardException
    Thrown when a player attempts to select a card type that cannot be chosen directly (e.g.
    OfferTile
    An offer tile that players choose during the placing phase.
    OffertileDTO
    Data-transfer object for an offer tile, carrying the tile's letter ID and the number of top/bottom draws available on it.
    OfferTileFactory
    Builds the set of offer tiles for a given player count by loading tile definitions from JSON resources.
    OnEventHuntOneFoodAndOnePPPerHunter
    Building effect triggered during a hunt event: awards 1 food plus 1 prestige point per Hunter card in the player's tribe.
    OnEventPaintingsOneFoodPerArtist
    Building effect triggered during a paintings (artist) event: awards 1 food per Artist card in the player's tribe.
    OrderOnDefaultTileMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies the client of the updated player order on the default tiles.
    PersistanceLogger
    Manages saving and loading the game state to and from disk in JSON format.
    PingMessage
    Client-to-server heartbeat message.
    PlacementTUI
    Handles the placement phase of the game: asking the player where to place their totem on the board and confirming the move with the server.
    PlacingPlayerMessage
    Client-to-server Socket message that requests a totem placement on an offer tile.
    Player
    Represents a Mesos player.
    PlayerAddedMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies the client a new player has joined the lobby.
    PlayerCardController
    JavaFX controller that renders a player's tribe cards as thumbnail images.
    PlayerDisconnectedMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies all clients when a player disconnects.
    PlayerDisconnectedMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies the client that a player has disconnected.
    PlayerDoNothingMessage
    Client-to-server Socket message requesting that the player skip their turn (used when no valid market action is available).
    PlayerDTO
    Data-transfer object for a Mesos player, carrying the nickname, food total, prestige-point total, totem color, and the list of tribe cards.
    PlayerMemento
    Memento snapshot of a single player's state at end of round.
    PlayerObserver
    Observer interface for player-level state changes in Mesos.
    PlayerPlacedOnOffertileMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies the client that a player placed their totem on an offer tile.
    PlayerReconnectedMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies all clients when a player reconnects.
    PlayerStatusController
    Controller for PlayerStatus.fxml.
    PlayerStatusTUI
    Displays the full status of all players when the user presses "i".
    PlayerToPlaceChangedMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies the client which player must place their totem next.
    PlayerToPlayChangedMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies the client which player must resolve their actions next.
    PlayerUpdateFoodMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies the client of an updated food total for a player.
    PlayerUpdatePPMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies the client of an updated prestige-point total for a player.
    PlusOneFoodOnReturnDefaultTile
    Building effect that awards 1 extra food when the player returns to a default tile whose food reward is non-negative (i.e.
    PongMessage
    Server-to-client heartbeat response.
    PongWatchdog
    Monitors server liveness by tracking the last time any activity was received.
    PPPerCharType
    Building effect that awards a fixed number of prestige points for each tribe member of a specified card type at end of game (or the configured trigger).
    ResolvedEventMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies the client that a specific event has been resolved.
    SelectCardFromBottomListMessage
    Client-to-server Socket message requesting that a card be drawn from the bottom market row.
    SelectCardFromTopListMessage
    Client-to-server Socket message requesting that a card be drawn from the top market row.
    SelectExtraCardMessage
    Client-to-server Socket message requesting an extra card draw triggered by the draw-one-more building effect.
    SendRankMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that delivers the global leaderboard to the client at the end of a game.
    ServerApp
    Entry point for the Mesos server.
    ServerListener
    Background thread that continuously reads ServerToClientMessage objects from the server socket stream and dispatches each one to the local ClientVirtualView.
    ServerNetworkHandler
    RMI server-side entry point for all Mesos client actions.
    ServerRemoteInterface
    Remote interface exposed by the Mesos server.
    ServerSocketProxy
    Client-side proxy that implements ServerRemoteInterface over a Socket connection.
    ServerToClientMessage
    Marker interface for all messages sent from the server to a Socket client.
    ServerVirtualView
    Server-side per-client view.
    SetSixCard
    Building effect that awards 6 prestige points for each complete set of one of each of the six tribe-card types that was added since the last evaluation.
    SHAMAN_STAR
    Represents the star value on a Shaman card.
    ShamanCard
    Represents a Shaman tribe card.
    ShamanEvent
    Event effect for a shamanic ritual event: the player(s) with the most Shaman stars earn PPToMost PP; the player(s) with the fewest stars lose PPToLeast PP.
    SixFoodCompletedSet
    Building effect that awards 5 food each time the player completes a full set of one of each of the six tribe-card types across the entire game.
    SkipExtraDrawMessage
    Client-to-server Socket message requesting that the player skip the extra draw granted by the draw-one-more building effect without selecting any card.
    SocketClientHandler
    Server-side thread that handles a single Socket client connection.
    SolvingEventsTUI
    TUI screen for the event-resolution phase.
    SustenanceEvent
    Event effect for a sustenance event: each tribe member costs food, Gatherers discount the cost, and players who cannot pay lose prestige points instead.
    ThreeMoreShamanStar
    Building effect that temporarily adds a 3-star Shaman card to the player's tribe before a shamanic ritual event, then removes it afterwards.
    Tile
    Abstract base class representing a board tile that can hold a single player.
    TileOccupiedException
    Thrown when a player attempts to place their totem on an offer tile that is already occupied.
    TopBuildingRefreshedMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies the client the top building row has been refreshed.
    TopBuildRemovedMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies the client a building was removed from the top market row.
    TopCardRefreshedMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies the client the top card row has been refreshed.
    TopCardRemovedMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies the client a card was removed from the top market row.
    Totem
    Immutable value object representing a player's totem, identified by its COLOR.
    TUIUtils
    Utility class for common TUI operations: screen management, input helpers, error formatting, and color constants.
    TurnManager
    Manages the turn order for both the placing and playing phases.
    TwentyFivePPEndGame
    Building effect that awards 25 prestige points at the end of the game.
    UtilitiesConstant
    Compile-time constants shared across the Mesos server model.
    UtilitiesFunction
    Logging utilities for the Mesos server.

    Copyright © 2026. All rights reserved.
